reviews.review_msg: Hemant Sashittal. This teacher made inappropriate and sexually suggestive comments toward my sister, which made her feel deeply uncomfortable and unsafe. Behavior like this is unacceptable from any educator. I hope the school addresses this seriously. And he loves trump.
Not an educator, just educated. He believes he is never wrong, and the student always is. Does not make me feel welcome at this school. Very upsetting to see him remained unchecked.

I dont know who all of you smarty pants think you are, but prof. merchant is absolutely the best prof. in the world. Just because he's strict doesnt mean he's arrogant and rude. Shame on you guys. Being strict means HELPING YOU NOT FAIL COLLEGE.

=) nice prof. dont take what he says too personally and you will have a good time in his class. sometimes,  he pushes the limits when what he says is not funny anymore, but he teaches well and class is interesting

hated him so much. Participation worth alot yet his standard is arbituary. Not only had to participate, but also you have to say something that suits his taste. If you aren't a good at shoe shining, AVOID HIM AT ALL COST

Get off your soapbox. If you want to score participation marks with this prof, then you better start sucking up and hanging around after class to be his friend. Doesn't respect and accept other perspectives. Unbelievable for a prof who seems to have absolutely no field experience and is probably one of the laziest profs.
Great prof. He was a bit intimidating at first, but he's a good guy. Very strong knowledge on joint ventures and IB in general.
pedantic, arrogant, and ethnocentric.  delusional ego for a man with no field experience.
